summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive item was detected, and no close/merge/fix action is allowed by the job gates. Items with proof/green checks or active design/technical-review questions are routed to maintainer judgment; the remaining proof-blocked PR is kept open without mutation.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix PR with current proof and linked open regression issue; merge/fix are blocked by job frontmatter and maintainer technical review is required before finalization.
Independent open PR that should remain open pending real behavior proof; no mutating cleanup is allowed or justified for this shard.
Slack channel-routing feature/fix candidate with proof but product and technical correctness judgment still required; merge/fix are blocked by job frontmatter.
Ready-for-maintainer PR with sufficient proof and green relevant checks; job requires maintainer judgment and does not permit merge or fix actions.
Useful but semantically sensitive model-fallback PR with prior review concerns and active author follow-up; maintainer technical judgment is required and merge/fix are blocked.

needs_human: #81939: maintainer technical review/finalization decision for focused bare /new and /reset fallthrough fix with current proof.
#82253: maintainer/product decision for Slack per-channel replyToMode behavior and relation to #89871 before finalization.
#81312: maintainer review decision for proof-sufficient bundled capability manifest contract fix.
#88329: maintainer technical/product decision for user-pinned model fallback semantics after prior design concerns and follow-up commits.
